Persona 5 Royal Keychains Finally Get to US and Canada Gashapon Machines

It took a while, but the Persona 5 Royal rubber mascot character keychains are in Gashapon machines in the US and Canada.

The post Persona 5 Royal Keychains Finally Get to US and Canada Gashapon Machines appeared first on Siliconera.

New The Ghost in the Shell Anime Trailer Teases July Debut

There's a trailer for the new The Ghost in the Shell anime that includes its release date and highlights it ahead of the Annecy debut.
